stream_a.title: 中小微企業淨零升級 綠色聚落帶動減碳
stream_a.summary: 為加速中小微企業淨零轉型並展示產業群體式輔導成果，經濟部中小及新創企業署7日舉辦「綠色聚落 減碳先鋒」淨零轉型成果記者會，展現推動策略由「單點式企業輔導」邁向「產業聚落共創」的新階段。面對全球淨零浪潮，中企署將輔導範疇由個別企業擴大為以地理鄰近及產業鏈緊密連結的產業聚落為核心，串聯法人單位、產業公協會及具產業影響力之中型企業擔任「減碳先鋒」，帶動上下游製造業與服務業投入減碳行動，使輔導效益由單一企業擴及整體聚落，共同打造兼具韌性與競爭力的綠色生態系。回顧推動歷程，中企署114年以推動中小微企業「知碳、減碳」為主軸，協助業者建立碳管理與減碳基礎能力；今年進一步推動「綠色聚落」，由個體調適邁向群聚共創。面對歐盟碳邊境調整機制（CBAM）、品牌商減碳要求，以及我國上市櫃企業接軌IFRS永續揭露準則趨勢，中小微企業往往受限於技術、人力與資金資源，難以獨力完成轉型；透過聚落輔導整合企業、技術服務及輔

stream_a.title: Steelmakers set for EU ETS “jackpot” despite free allocation fears, think-tank says
stream_a.summary: EU steelmakers are set to benefit from the EU’s Emissions Trading System (EU ETS) and Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) in the coming years, despite industry concerns over the phaseout of free allowances, according to a brief by a Brussels-based climate policy think-tank.

stream_a.title: Euro Markets: EUAs give up Monday’s gain amid steady day-long selling, as gas jumps on tanker attack
stream_a.summary: EU carbon allowances gave up all Monday's price gains from Tuesday and more, as sellers came to the fore despite the approaching reduction in EU auction volumes as the REPowerEU programme is expected to end on Thursday, while energy markets rallied after an LNG tanker was attacked overnight.

stream_a.title: EU clean tech chief pushes back against lowering ETS emissions cap
stream_a.summary: Teresa Ribera, the EU’s clean technology chief, is at odds with European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen over how steeply carbon allowances under the EU’s Emissions Trading System (EU ETS) should decline each year, according to multiple sources.

stream_a.title: ANNOUNCEMENT: Carbon Pulse launches EU ETS data portal ahead of flagship reform
stream_a.summary: Market, policy, and emissions data at your fingertips as the European Commission prepares to issue legislative proposals to reform the world’s largest compliance carbon market by traded value.

stream_a.title: Industrial carbon management coalition backs “strong, predictable” EU ETS
stream_a.summary: A broad coalition of industrial carbon management stakeholders has urged the European Union to use the forthcoming review of the bloc’s Emissions Trading System (EU ETS) to preserve the market’s core architecture while directing a larger share of its revenues into industrial decarbonisation.

stream_a.summary: On 6 July, the environment committee, ENVI, adopted compromise amendments to the legislative proposal to extend the CBAM carbon border levy to new sectors along the steel and aluminium supply chains.
